title: Reigniting Passion: 5 Steps to Revive Your Spark
caption: Are you ready to bring the fire back into your relationship?
layout: A 4-stage progression infographic. Each stage represents a step: 1. Reflect on what's changed, 2. Communicate desires, 3. Explore new experiences together, 4. Reconnect emotionally. Each section has a brief explanation and engaging visuals.

title: The Sexpectations Gap: What’s Real vs. Unrealistic
caption: Are your expectations of intimacy holding you back?
layout: A two-column compare infographic. Column 1 lists common unrealistic expectations, Column 2 provides realistic counterparts. Helpful tips are included for each expectation.

title: The Four Pillars of Lasting Desire
caption: What foundations do you have for your intimacy?
layout: A cycle diagram showing four interconnected pillars: Trust, Communication, Adventure, and Vulnerability. Each section details how to strengthen that pillar in your relationship.

title: Understanding Your Pleasure Map
caption: Have you explored all your pleasure zones?
layout: A 2x2 grid, featuring 'Physical' vs 'Emotional' on one axis and 'Active' vs 'Passive' on the other. Each section contains specific tips for enhancing pleasure in those areas.

title: Intimacy Over Time: A Midlife Evolution
caption: Is your intimacy evolving as you are?
layout: A 4-stage progression infographic detailing how intimacy can change over decades: 20s (Exploration), 30s (Building), 40s (Deepening), and 50s (Embracing). With insights for each decade.

title: The Desire Cycle: Navigating Sexual Fluctuations
caption: Are you caught in a cycle of desire highs and lows?
layout: A cycle diagram depicting the stages of the desire cycle: Interest → Exploration → Satisfaction → Diminishment. Each phase provides tips on how to navigate through to rejuvenate desire.

title: Embodying Your Desires: A Journey to Self-Discovery
caption: Are you fully embracing your desires?
layout: A 4-stage progression insight focusing on recognising desires, understanding them, communicating them, and embodying them. Each stage has an engaging visual and actionable steps.

title: The Connection Checklist: 7 Questions to Ask Each Other
caption: How connected do you really feel?
layout: A checklist-style infographic with seven relationship questions broken down into emotional, physical, and experiential categories. Each question prompts engagement and reflection.

title: Unpacking Your Emotional Baggage
caption: What weight are you carrying in your relationships?
layout: A two-column compare infographic. Left column lists types of emotional baggage (e.g. past traumas, fears), right column offers strategies to unpack and lighten the load.

title: The Sensuality Spectrum: Discovering Your Passion Level
caption: Where do you fall on the sensuality spectrum?
layout: A gradient scale infographic indicating Low, Moderate, and High levels of sensuality. Each section offers tailored advice for enhancing sensual experiences based on where one falls.

title: Barriers to Intimacy: What’s Holding You Back?
caption: Are there unseen obstacles in your intimacy journey?
layout: A two-column compare showing 'Common Barriers' (e.g. Stress, Time Constraints) vs 'Solutions' (e.g. Schedule Date Nights, Mindfulness Practices) to break through the barriers.

title: The Chemistry Continues: Beyond the Physical
caption: What keeps the chemistry alive in midlife?
layout: A 4-stage progression infographic outlining Mental, Emotional, Physical, and Spiritual chemistry. Each section highlights how to nurture that aspect in your relationship.

title: Redefining Beauty: Attractiveness Beyond Appearance
caption: How do you perceive your beauty as you age?
layout: A two-column compare infographic. Left column features 'Societal Standards' (e.g. Youth, Size), right column promotes 'Self-Acceptance' (e.g. Confidence, Wisdom) with empowering statements.

title: Navigating the Fear of Rejection
caption: Is fear holding you back from real intimacy?
layout: A cycle diagram illustrating Fear → Avoidance → Miscommunication → Isolation. Each stage provides insights on overcoming and breaking the cycle.

title: The Dance of Desire: Communicating Needs
caption: Are you dancing together or stepping on toes?
layout: A step-by-step infographic illustrating a dance metaphor for communication in intimacy. Each step represents a critical element: Listen, Share, Experiment, Reflect.

title: Intimacy Rituals to Bring You Closer
caption: What rituals can strengthen your bond?
layout: A checklist-style infographic featuring six intimacy rituals (e.g. Weekly Date Nights, Shared Gratitude) with quick explanations and visual representation.

title: Exploring New Dimensions of Intimacy
caption: Are you open to new experiences in intimacy?
layout: A two-column compare infographic showing 'Traditional Intimacy' (e.g. Penetrative Sex) vs. 'Exploratory Intimacy' (e.g. Tantric Practices) with pros and cons for each.

title: Navigating Change: Embracing Midlife Transitions
caption: Are you embracing or resisting change?
layout: A 4-stage progression detailing stages of transition: Letting Go, Exploring, Accepting, and Thriving, with actionable tips for each phase of the journey.

title: Creating Your Intimacy Vision Board
caption: Have you visualised your ideal intimacy life?
layout: A collage-style infographic prompting the creation of a vision board, with sections for 'Emotional', 'Physical', 'Experiential', and 'Spiritual' aspects of intimacy.

title: The Silence of Shame: Breaking the Stigma
caption: What shames hold you back from intimacy?
layout: A two-column infographic contrasting 'Sources of Shame' (e.g., Past Experiences, Cultural Beliefs) with 'Paths to Healing' (e.g., Talking it Out, Therapy) with supportive tips.

title: The Sound of Your Voice: Speaking Your Needs
caption: Are you heard in your relationship?
layout: A 4-stage process on how to effectively communicate needs: Identify, Express, Listen, and Adjust. Each stage contains practical tips for effective communication.

title: Giving Yourself Permission: The Key to Pleasure
caption: Are you allowing yourself to experience pleasure?
layout: An actionable checklist infographic that explores the concept of self-permission with phrases like 'I deserve pleasure' and practical ways to implement this in daily life.

title: The Intimacy Rainbow: Exploring Emotional Depths
caption: What colours make up your intimacy experience?
layout: A gradient spectrum infographic that includes shades to represent varying levels of emotional intimacy, from Red (Passionate) to Blue (Comfortable). Tips for enhancing each colour are included.

title: Shedding the Shoulds: Choosing Your Own Path
caption: Whose expectations are you following?
layout: A two-column list comparing 'Societal 'Shoulds' (e.g. Be Submissive) vs 'Personal Wants' (e.g. Be Empowered), offering empowering affirmations and actionable recommendations.

title: From Roommates to Lovers: Rekindling Your Connection
caption: Have you slipped into the roommate phase?
layout: A progression infographic illustrating steps to reignite romance: Acknowledge, Commit, Explore, and Maintain, with supportive tips and visuals on each step.
